queries.question: Show the name of reality shows filmed by network A and the city where it was filmed.
queries.sql: Select name, city FROM RealityShows WHERE network = "Network A";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?city WHERE {
  ?realityshows a :RealityShows .
  ?realityshows p:name ?name .
  ?realityshows p:city ?city .
  ?realityshows p:network ?network_f .
  FILTER(STR(?network_f) = STR("Network A"))
}

queries.question: What was the name of the reality show where the host was Host2, and in what country was it filmed?
queries.sql: Select name, country FROM RealityShows WHERE host = "Host2";
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?country WHERE {
  ?realityshows a :RealityShows .
  ?realityshows p:name ?name .
  ?realityshows p:country ?country .
  ?realityshows p:host ?host_f .
  FILTER(STR(?host_f) = STR("Host2"))
}
